semantic.label: Semantic Search
semantic.desc: Use vectors for text relevance queries

fulltext.label: Full-text Search
fulltext.desc: Use traditional full-text search, suitable for keywords and specific subject-predicate data

hybrid.label: Hybrid Search
hybrid.desc: Return combined results of vector and full-text search, sorted using RRF algorithm.

scoreTypeDesc.comprehensive: Merge multiple search results through inverted calculation.
scoreTypeDesc.rerank: Calculate sentence relevance using Rerank model, range 0-1.
scoreTypeDesc.semantic: Calculate score by distance between vectors, range 0-1.
scoreTypeDesc.fulltext: Calculate score for same keywords, range 0-infinity.

promptAgentQA.description:
The text within the <Context></Context> tags is the source material. Learn and analyze it, then organize your findings:
- Ask questions and provide answers for each.
- Answers should be detailed and complete, preserving original descriptions as much as possible, with appropriate expansion.
- Answers can contain plain text, links, code, tables, formulas, media links, and other Markdown elements.
- Ask at most 50 questions.
- Generated questions and answers should be in the same language as the source text.
promptAgentQA.fixedText:
Please organize your findings in the following format:
<Context>
Text
</Context>
Q1: Question.
A1: Answer.
Q2:
A2:

------

Let's start!

<Context>
{{text}}
</Context>

network.noResponse: No response, please check your network

versionCheck.newVersionDetected: New version available. Refresh to get the latest features.
